title: AiInteraction
description: Represents an interaction between a user and Copilot across Microsoft 365 applications.

id.description: The unique identifier for the interaction message.

appClass.description: The data source for Copilot data. For example, IPM.SkypeTeams.Message.Copilot.Excel or IPM.SkypeTeams.Message.Copilot.Loop.

interactionType.description: Indicates whether the interaction is a user prompt or a Copilot response.

conversationType.description: The type of the conversation (e.g., appchat, bizchat).

requestId.description: Identifier that groups a user prompt with its corresponding Copilot response.

sessionId.description: Thread ID or conversation identifier that maps to all Copilot sessions for the user.

createdDateTime.description: The time when the interaction was created.

etag.description: Timestamp of when the interaction was last modified.

attachments.description: Collection of documents attached to the interaction, such as cards and images.

contexts.description: Identifiers that map to all contexts associated with the interaction.

links.description: Collection of links that appear in the interaction.

mentions.description: Collection of entities mentioned in the interaction, including users and bots.
